mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise WHERE id = #{id}
AND (is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
AND is_builtin = 1
LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_builtin = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise
LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
AND (is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
AND is_builtin = 1
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise
(is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
is_builtin = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_builtin = 0 THEN 0 WHEN category = 'CARDIO' THEN 1 WHEN category = 'STRENGTH' THEN 2 WHEN category = 'BALL' THEN 3 WHEN category = 'FLEXIBILITY' THEN 4 WHEN category = 'DAILY' THEN 5 WHEN category = 'OTHER' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, user_id, name, met_value, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM exercise
user_id = #{userId} AND is_builtin = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN category = 'CARDIO' THEN 1 WHEN category = 'STRENGTH' THEN 2 WHEN category = 'BALL' THEN 3 WHEN category = 'FLEXIBILITY' THEN 4 WHEN category = 'DAILY' THEN 5 WHEN category = 'OTHER' THEN 6 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC
